name: Nøtterøy Golfklubb

course.signatureHole: Idylliske omgivelser i Hellaskogen på Nøtterøy
course.signatureHole_en: Idyllic surroundings in Hellaskogen on Notteroy
course.scenicHole: Idylliske omgivelser i Hellaskogen på Nøtterøy
course.scenicHole_en: Idyllic surroundings in Hellaskogen on Notteroy
course.viewDescription: Nøtterøy Golfklubb - 18-hulls parkland/skogsbane designet av Jeremy Turner i Hellaskogen, kun 6 km fra Tønsberg. Par 72, 6225m med 7 teesteder. Pluss 6-hulls korthullsbane. Trackman Range med gressutslag. Klubbhus designet av John H. Støre med garderober, pro shop (09:00-16:00), café (09:00-16:00). Toalett på bane, drikkevannstasjoner. Golfbil/tralle-utleie.
course.viewDescription_en: Notteroy Golf Club - 18-hole parkland/woodland course designed by Jeremy Turner in Hellaskogen, just 6 km from Tonsberg. Par 72, 6,225m with 7 tee positions. Plus 6-hole short course. Trackman Range with grass tee area. Clubhouse designed by John H. Store with changing rooms, pro shop (09:00-16:00), cafe (09:00-16:00). Toilets on course, drinking water stations. Electric buggy/trolley hire.

description: Nøtterøy Golfklubb - 18-hulls parkland/skogsbane designet av Jeremy Turner, åpnet 2003. Par 72, 6225 meter med syv teesteder. Klubbtee herre 5722m, dame 4644m. Pluss 6-hulls korthullsbane. Ligger i Hellaskogen på idylliske Nøtterøy, kun 6 km fra Tønsberg sentrum. Klubbhus designet av arkitekt John H. Støre.
description_en: Notteroy Golf Club - 18-hole parkland/woodland course designed by Jeremy Turner, opened 2003. Par 72, 6,225 metres with seven tee positions. Club tee men 5,722m, ladies 4,644m. Plus 6-hole short course. Located in Hellaskogen on idyllic Notteroy, just 6 km from Tonsberg town centre. Clubhouse designed by architect John H. Store.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Greenfee 2026: 18 hull 500 kr. Junior 240 kr, Junior lokal (Borre/Vestfold) 200 kr. Norsk Senior Golf hverdager 08:00-15:00 500 kr (ikke juli, max 3 runder). Korthullsbane 99 kr/dag eller 499 kr sesongkort, gratis for juniorer.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Green fee 2026: 18 holes 500 NOK. Junior 240 NOK, Junior local (Borre/Vestfold) 200 NOK. Norwegian Senior Golf weekdays 08:00-15:00 500 NOK (not July, max 3 rounds). Short course 99 NOK/day or 499 NOK season pass, free for juniors.
2026.notes: Golfbil 500 kr (medlemmer 400 kr). Tralle 75 kr. Elektrisk tralle 200 kr. Korthullsbane 99 kr/dag eller 499 kr sesongkort, gratis for juniorer. Vipps #108710. Prebooking utover 6-7 dager koster 100 kr pr. spiller.
2026.notes_en: Golf buggy 500 NOK (members 400 NOK). Trolley 75 NOK. Electric trolley 200 NOK. Short course 99 NOK/day or 499 NOK season pass, free for juniors. Vipps #108710. Pre-booking beyond 6-7 days costs 100 NOK per player.

2026.name: Voksen
2026.description: Full spillerett. Forhåndsbooking 7 dager. 30% rabatt greenfee hos Larvik, Sandefjord, Borre (1. mai - 1. okt). 20% rabatt Tjøme (ikke 23. juni - 10. aug). Årskort driving range 3000 kr. Golfbil 400 kr.
2026.description_en: Full playing rights. Advance booking 7 days. 30% green fee discount at Larvik, Sandefjord, Borre (1 May - 1 Oct). 20% discount Tjome (not 23 June - 10 Aug). Annual driving range pass 3,000 NOK. Golf buggy 400 NOK.

2026.name: Ung Voksen 20-35 år
2026.description_en: Full playing rights for members aged 20-35.

2026.name: Honnør 75+
2026.description: Full spillerett for medlemmer 75 år og eldre.
2026.description_en: Full playing rights for members aged 75 and over.

2026.name: Student/militær 20-26 år
2026.description_en: For students and military personnel aged 20-26.

2026.name: Greenfee-medlemskap
2026.description_en: Green fee membership without fixed playing rights.

2026.name: Junior 13-19 år
2026.description_en: Full playing rights for juniors aged 13-19.

2026.name: Junior 6-12 år
2026.description_en: Full playing rights for juniors aged 6-12.

2026.name: Innmeldingsavgift
2026.description: Engangsavgift for nye medlemmer (gjelder ikke juniorer).
2026.description_en: One-off fee for new members (does not apply to juniors).

2026.name: Årskort Driving Range
2026.description: Ubegrenset bruk av driving range hele sesongen.
2026.description_en: Unlimited use of the driving range for the entire season.
